name: Set-Clipboard

options.name: -Append
options.description: Indicates that the cmdlet should add to the clipboard instead of replacing it. By default, the cmdlet clears the current content from the clipboard and sets it to the new content. When this parameter is specified, the cmdlet appends the new content after a newline to the current content.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: Returns an object representing the item with which you're working. By default, this cmdlet does not generate any output.

options.name: -Value
options.description: The string values to be added to the clipboard.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Sets the contents of the clipboard.
